name: Super Nintendo Entertainment System
description: Nintendo's 16-bit home console platform, known as the Super Famicom in Japan. Home to major Nintendo sequels, RPGs, action games, and late 2D masterpieces.

eras.title: 16-bit Foundation Era
eras.description: Launch and early years led by Nintendo sequels, arcade ports, and the move beyond NES-era design.

eras.title: RPG and Expansion Era
eras.description: The platform broadens through RPGs, fighting games, licensed titles, and stronger third-party output.

eras.title: Late 2D Mastery Era
eras.description: Late-generation technical refinement, ambitious 2D games, and releases overlapping the 32/64-bit transition.
